title: Use your mobile device's camera
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

sections.title: What are the requirements for using this feature?

steps.text: A PC running Windows 11 or later.
Android device running Android 10 or later.
Link to Windows app version 1.24022.0 or later.
If your Android device isn't linked yet, click on Add device to initiate the linking process.
Your linked Android device will appear under My devices .
Toggle on Use as connected camera to enable this feature.

sections.title: My video is being blocked my background. What should I do?
